hero.title: Modern Solutions for Customer Engagement
hero.description: Highly customizable components for building modern websites and applications that look and feel the way you mean it.

features.sectionDescription: Powerful tools and features designed to meet every aspect of your workflow.

customizable.title: Customizable
customizable.description: Extensive customization options, allowing you to tailor every aspect to meet your specific needs.

control.title: You have full control
control.description: From design elements to functionality, you have complete control to create a unique and personalized experience.

ai.title: Powered By AI
ai.description: Elements to functionality, you have complete control to create a unique experience.

content.title: The GitDeep ecosystem brings together your repos.
content.p1: GitDeep is evolving to be more than just analysis.
content.p2: It supports developers and teams — from architecture analysis to security, documentation, and community scoring.
content.quote: Using GitDeep has been like unlocking a secret engineering superpower. It's the perfect fusion of simplicity and depth.

integrations.title: Integrate with your favorite tools
integrations.description: Connect seamlessly with popular platforms and services to enhance your workflow.

dashboard.recentAnalysesDesc: Your most recently run repo analyses.

dashboardReport.secretScanEmpty: No leaked secrets were found in this repository.

dashboardTeam.title: Team

pricingPage.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricingPage.description: Choose the plan that's right for you.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For developers who need more power.

aboutPage.title: About GitDeep
aboutPage.description: GitDeep is built by a team of passionate developers who believe in better tooling for code analysis.
aboutPage.missionBody: We are on a mission to simplify repository analysis and help teams build better software.
aboutPage.missionBody2: Understanding large, complex codebases shouldn't require days of manual reading. We built GitDeep to give developers instant context, automated documentation, and AI-driven insights directly from their repositories.
aboutPage.missionBody3: Our goal is to make every developer feel like a core contributor from day one, regardless of the project's size or complexity.
aboutPage.teamDescription: The people building the future of repo analysis.

innovation.title: Continuous Innovation
innovation.description: Always pushing the boundaries of what AI can do for code.

quality.title: Uncompromising Quality
quality.description: Building tools that developers can trust.

community.title: Community Driven
community.description: Listening to our users and open-source contributors.
